en: For this reason I, Paul, a prisoner for Christ Jesus on behalf of you Gentiles-
zh: 因此，我這為你們外族人的緣故，作了為基督耶穌被囚禁的保羅，為你們祈求─

en: assuming that you have heard of the stewardship of God's grace that was given to me for you,
zh: 想必你們聽過 神恩惠的計劃，他為你們的緣故賜恩給我，

en: how the mystery was made known to me by revelation, as I have written briefly.
zh: 藉著啟示使我可以知道這奧祕，就像我以前在信中略略提過的。

en: When you read this, you can perceive my insight into the mystery of Christ,
zh: 你們讀了，就可以知道我深深地明白基督的奧祕。

en: which was not made known to the sons of men in other generations as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit.
zh: 這奧祕在以前的世代並沒有讓世人知道，不像現在藉著聖靈啟示了聖使徒和先知那樣。

en: This mystery is that the Gentiles are fellow heirs, members of the same body, and partakers of the promise in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
zh: 這奧祕就是外族人在基督耶穌裡，藉著福音可以同作後嗣，同為一體，同蒙應許。

en: Of this gospel I was made a minister according to the gift of God's grace, which was given me by the working of his power.
zh: 我作了福音的僕役，是照著 神的恩賜 ；這恩賜是按著他大能的作為賜給我的。

en: To me, though I am the very least of all the saints, this grace was given, to preach to the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ,
zh: 我本來比聖徒中最小的還小， 神還是賜給我這恩典，要我把基督那測不透的豐富傳給外族人，

en: and to bring to light for everyone what is the plan of the mystery hidden for ages in God who created all things,
zh: 並且使眾人明白那奧祕的救世計劃是甚麼 ，

en: so that through the church the manifold wisdom of God might now be made known to the rulers and authorities in the heavenly places.
zh: 為了要使天上執政的和掌權的，現在藉著教會都可以知道 神各樣的智慧。

en: This was according to the eternal purpose that he has realized in Christ Jesus our Lord,
zh: 這都是照著 神在我們主基督耶穌裡所成就的永恆的旨意。

en: in whom we have boldness and access with confidence through our faith in him.
zh: 我們因信基督，就在他裡面坦然無懼，滿有把握地進到 神面前。

en: So I ask you not to lose heart over what I am suffering for you, which is your glory.
zh: 因此，我懇求你們，不要因著我為你們所受的苦難而沮喪，這原是你們的光榮。

en: For this reason I bow my knees before the Father,
zh: 因此，我在父面前屈膝，

en: from whom every family in heaven and on earth is named,
that according to the riches of his glory he may grant you to be strengthened with power through his Spirit in your inner being,
zh: 求他按著他榮耀的豐盛，藉著他的靈，用大能使你們內在的人剛強起來，

en: so that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith- that you, being rooted and grounded in love,
zh: 使基督藉著你們的信，住在你們心裡，使你們既然在愛中扎根建基，

en: may have strength to comprehend with all the saints what is the breadth and length and height and depth,
zh: 就能和眾聖徒一同領悟基督的愛是多麼的長闊高深，

en: and to know the love of Christ that surpasses knowledge, that you may be filled with all the fullness of God.
zh: 並且知道他的愛是超過人所能理解的，使你們被充滿，得著 神的一切豐盛。

en: Now to him who is able to do far more abundantly than all that we ask or think, according to the power at work within us,
zh: 願榮耀歸給 神，就是歸給那能照著運行在我們裡面的大能，充充足足地成就一切，超過我們所求所想的。

en: to him be glory in the church and in Christ Jesus throughout all generations, forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 願榮耀在教會中和基督耶穌裡歸給他，直到萬代，永世無窮。阿們。
